params.director_note: STRICT_CHECK: Implement 4D Simplex-based Curl Noise physics for organic, non-linear movement. Particles should swirl, not random jitter. Apply `p.flicker_offset = sin(time * flicker_speed + p.id) * 0.5 + 0.5`. Use Luminance Map to attract particles to the 'glowing moss' areas (Y-axis spawn bias > 0.6). Additive blending is essential. Particles must have a 'Glow' radius.
